title: Document with rich inline formatting
content:
This paragraph has bold text and italic text and inline code.

It also has chemical formulas like H2O and exponents like x2.

And a link with a label embedded in prose.

title: A second chapter
content: The current parser flattens all of these to plain text via .textContent. Phase 6 work on EPUB will revisit the renderer contract to preserve inline semantics.
